purpose: Human-facing landing page for ai-dev-envbuild; describes the project as a reproducible Debian/Ubuntu/WSL2 dev environment, documents all install groups, devtools subcommands, directory layout, key conventions, and the add-a-tool workflow.
invariants: The install group table and command examples must stay synchronized with bootstrap.sh's DEFAULT_GROUPS and module group names
Version shown in the header badge must match the VERSION file
gotchas: The changelog section in README.md is a brief summary only — the full changelog is in CHANGELOG.md
README references docs/architecture.md and docs/agent-rules.md for full design rationale — changes to those docs should be reflected here if they affect the user-facing summary
